title: Velvety Comforting French Citrus Stir-fry
description: A citrusy, velvety French dish featuring scotch bonnet for a spicy kick, nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Leicester Cheese or Nut-Free Alternative
ingredients.notes: Grated for added richness and creaminess

ingredients.name: Lemon Zest
ingredients.notes: Freshly grated for a bright citrus flavor

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add egg and stir-fry until set, breaking it into small pieces to create a velvety texture.
Add scotch bonnet peppers and grated ginger. Stir for about 1 minute until fragrant but not burnt.
Drizzle in white wine (if using) and simmer for an additional minute to reduce slightly and add depth of flavor.
Garnish with lemon zest, Leicester cheese (or alternative), and a pinch of salt.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
